title: project-calibration-real-java-multimodule-fixture
rawUserRequest: 执行项目校准计划工单 10：建立至少两个模块的真实 Java Fixture，执行安装、构建、测试、质量检查、升级和回滚，追踪八阶段生命周期；工具链不可用时明确 not_run，不能把 Manifest 记录冒充执行证据；不启动工单 1。

declaredIntent.summary: Make the Java multi-module fixture execute real local compilation/tests and expose explicit unavailable-toolchain evidence.

outOfScope: External provider, Maven repository, or enterprise identity evidence
Starting Work Item 1 or later Work Items

sources.reason: Executes the multi-module Java lifecycle and validates evidence boundaries.
Documents controlled fixture evidence and non-claims.
Defines local_real_execution, not_run, and simulation evidence kinds.

riskAssessment.reason: The fixture is dependency-free across two Java modules; missing JDK/Maven capabilities must remain explicit not_run evidence.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized serial execution of this bounded fixture Work Item.

preReviewWarnings: Reject declarative phase records as execution evidence; verify module compilation, tests, upgrade/rollback, and unavailable-toolchain handling.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The Java fixture executes two module compilation and test paths with real javac/java commands and records Maven unavailability separately.
All eight lifecycle phases are represented with explicit local_real_execution, blocked, or not_run evidence and resume conditions.
Tests and documentation distinguish executable local evidence from provider/identity/sandbox evidence that remains not_run.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The Java fixture has two modules and a shell lifecycle, but phase records use ad hoc executed labels and do not uniformly identify real execution versus unavailable or simulated evidence.
constraints: Keep the fixture dependency-free and local; do not claim Maven provider, identity, sandbox, immutable audit, or enterprise evidence.
Record missing JDK/Maven as not_run with a reason.
Do not start Work Item 1 or later Work Items.
intent.rationale: Explicit evidence kinds and real two-module commands make the Java lifecycle reproducible without overstating external capabilities.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Both core and app modules compile and executable tests pass with JDK available
Ambiguous and critical-domain phases remain blocked with resume conditions

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized serial execution of the recalibration plan, including this fixture Work Item.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
